series_metadata.series_title: Application and Receipt of Inspection of Salvage/Self-assembled inspections
series_metadata.series_description: To provide a record of those vehicles presented for salvage and/or self-assembled inspections. Forms: HP-105, HP-106, HP-106F

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: HP-106, Vehicle Identity Inspection – Source documentation to be retained five (5) years, plus current, then deleted from computer system.HP-106F – Deleted by system after printed document presented to applicant, documenting failure of inspection. ; Paper: Upon purchase from customer, the BASS system produces the HP-105, Receipt for Salvage Inspection. Retain for calendar year plus current and then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
